crime.value: Serial murder for fashion materials - killing people to harvest their skin for luxury clothing production
crime.quote: you don't do it on an animal...you must be sure that the 'someone' you get it from, will not be missed

victim.value: The interviewer - targeted for having beautiful skin and no living relatives to miss them
victim.quote: You have a very beautiful skin...So tell me. Do you have any living relatives?

culprit_and_motive.value: Alayna Clou - fashion designer killing people to create her signature 'Fétiche Skin' fabric for haute couture
culprit_and_motive.quote: I scrape the fats, muscles and hair off the skin...Those are my favorite parts

investigator.value: The interviewer - journalist conducting what becomes a victim's perspective horror revelation
investigator.quote: This was...the first time that she let anyone outside her company see her in person

red_herring.value: Fashion industry charitable work and fabric innovation presented as legitimate business to mask serial killing for materials
red_herring.quote: This was after her visit to the Caring Shelter, one of the many homes around the world that Clou's charity foundation

clue_fairness.value: Alayna's obsessive focus on interviewer's skin quality and her admission about needing victims who won't be missed
clue_fairness.quote: You have a very beautiful skin... Very beautiful skin you have... Do you have any living relatives?

social_world.value: High fashion elite with exclusive access, targeting homeless and isolated individuals who lack social protection
social_world.quote: homes around the world that Clou's charity foundation called Un Fétiche à Aider put up to help the homeless drifters

reveal_mechanic.value: Gradual revelation through fabric production process description culminating in admission that skin comes from humans
reveal_mechanic.quote: Only, you don't do it on an animal... you must be sure that the 'someone' you get it from, will not be missed

media_and_audience.value: Fashion industry celebrity status and exclusive interview format legitimizes and conceals the horrific truth
media_and_audience.quote: This is the first time that Clou herself spoke up... first time that she let anyone outside her company see her

investigator_wound.value: Interviewer's professional admiration and personal vulnerability as isolated potential victim
investigator_wound.quote: She wasn't as intimidating as she seemed in the magazines... Do you have any living relatives?
